name: Frozen Fruit Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
GARNISH:
Lemon leaves, halved strawberries,
blueberries, raspberries and
nectarine wedges
IMPORTANT NOTE:
Begin about 3 -1/2 hours before serving or prepare a day ahead.
Line (twelve) 2-1/2-inch muffin pan cups with fluted paper baking cups. Into a
large bowl, grate peel from lemon. Add buttermilk, sugar and salt. With wire whisk; mix until blended. Gently stir in 1-1/4 cups fruit. Spoon mixture into paper baking cups. Top with remaining 3/4 cup fruit. Some fruit will stay above mixture for pretty color.
Cover; freeze until firm, about 3 hours. Peel off paper baking cups from dessert.
